package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_contains_retry_or_backoff_orchestration
// Rule intent: Handlers that implement retry loops or backoff decisions inline
// instead of delegating to service or client layers.
func PositiveGinHandlerContainsRetryOrBackoffOrchestration(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var req struct {
		ID string `json:"id" binding:"required"`
	}
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	var result struct {
		ID     string `gorm:"column:id"`
		Status string `gorm:"column:status"`
	}

	var err error
	for i := 0; i < 3; i++ {
		err = db.Where("id = ?", req.ID).First(&result).Error
		if err == nil {
			break
		}
		time.Sleep(time.Duration(i+1) * time.Second)
	}

	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "operation failed after retries"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"data": result})
}
